spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move custom package imports to the top of the import block, separating them from standard library and framework imports.
Replace tab-based indentation with spaces to conform to standard Java coding conventions.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to 4 spaces for all method bodies and annotations.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove trailing whitespace and empty lines containing only whitespace to clean up the file structure.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Removed empty lines with trailing spaces between methods.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Break long method signatures and chained calls into multiple lines for improved readability.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Split `retrieveDetailsForCourse` parameters and `registerStudentForCourse` body into multiple lines.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Reformat the String.format call in toString() to improve readability by placing the format string on a single line.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: return String.format("Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name, description, steps);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Simplify the null-check logic in the equals method by combining conditions into a more concise return statement.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: if (id == null) { return other.id == null; } else return id.equals(other.id);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace @Component with @Service to align with Spring Boot 3 best practices for service layer beans.
Mark the static students list as final to enforce immutability of the reference.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private static final List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move SecureRandom initialization from method scope to field declaration for better encapsulation.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private final SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace Arrays.asList with List.of to utilize Java 9+ immutable list factory methods.
Rename course variables to camelCase (courseOne, courseTwo) for better readability.
Replace verbose if-null check with ternary operator for concise null handling.
Remove unused java.util.Arrays import after migrating to List.of.
Replace Arrays.asList with List.of for immutable list creation in test data setup.
Update mock course description and expected JSON to match the new '10Steps' format without spaces.
Adjust indentation and line breaks to conform to modern Java coding standards.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the explicit @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation because its functionality is already included in the @SpringBootApplication meta-annotation.
Activate the security configuration class by uncommenting the @Configuration annotation.
Correct a typo in the course description string from '10 Steps' to '10Steps' to match expected data format.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add explicit import for JSONException to satisfy the throws clause added to the test method.
Add throws JSONException to the test method signature to handle checked exceptions from JSONAssert.
Fix string literal in expected JSON response to match actual data format (removing space).
Fix string literal in Course constructor argument to match actual data format (removing space).
Update test data strings to remove spaces, likely aligning with changes in the application logic or expected output format.
